# LIO-125: API - Review - Problema al realizar una calificacion

| Campo | Valor |
|-------|-------|
| Estado | Finalizada (Listo) |
| Tipo | Subtarea |
| Prioridad | Medium |
| Asignado | Ezequiel manzano |
| Reportado por | Catriel Mercurio |
| Creado | 2024-11-08 07:34 |
| Actualizado | 2024-11-19 16:57 |
| Etiquetas | ninguna |
| Jira | [LIO-125](https://bluinc.atlassian.net/browse/LIO-125) |

## Descripción

Al realizar una calificación se recibe un pequeño error SQL

```
curl 'https://api4.libreopcion.com.ar/v4/pedidos/comprasCalificacion' \
  -X 'PATCH' \
  -H 'accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'accept-language: es-US,es-419;q=0.9,es;q=0.8,gl;q=0.7,en;q=0.6' \
  -H 'authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..4ecMUovf7zpgK-ENDFd78vus-eNi9P-8TWJdEbmIC1Y' \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -H 'origin: https://libreopcion.com.ar' \
  -H 'priority: u=1, i' \
  -H 'referer: https://libreopcion.com.ar/' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="130", "Google Chrome";v="130", "Not?A_Brand";v="99"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Linux"' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-dest: empty' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-mode: cors' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-site: same-site' \
  -H 'user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/130.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' \
  --data-raw '{"comentario":"","pedidoCabecerVendedorId":"659146","calificacion":"2","token":"ca214bd529d2bac77b3d2bb3b819a9f25551b94765ae3e2c832e3474760072d8"}'
```

```
{
    "errors": {
        "status": 500,
        "title": "SQLSTATE[HY000]: General error: 20018 Incorrect syntax near '?'. [20018] (severity 15) [ UPDATE [LO].[dbo].[pedidosCabeceraVendedor] SET calificacion = 2, calificacionComentario = ?, calificacionFecha = GETDATE(), calificacionType = ? WHERE id = 659146 AND token = 'ca214bd529d2bac77b3d2bb3b819a9f25551b94765ae3e2c832e3474760072d8' ]",
        "file": "\/var\/www\/app\/app\/Repository\/Calificacion\/CalificacionRepository.php",
        "line": 18
    }
}
```
